title: tetranthera lancifolia var. pusilla
intro: Tetranthera lancifolia var. pusilla, also known as the small-leaved tetranthera, is a plant species that belongs to the Annonaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Tetranthera lancifolia var. pusilla include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Tetranthera lancifolia var. pusilla can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
